curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch adds integer overflow checks before allocating framebuffers in both RGBFramebufferModel::load and YFramebufferModel::load. The two other files changed (FramebufferModel.h and FramebufferModel.cpp) are type cleanup converting raw float* to std::vector<float> and do not contain the vulnerable allocation logic themselves. Pre-assigned class buffer-overflow (CWE-120) is correct: the root cause is an integer overflow in the width*height multiplication leading to undersized buffer allocation and out-of-bounds writes. Noisy patch marked true because 4 non-test source files were changed.
